(2) 4x1 − 2x2 + 4x3 = 16 → divide by 2: 2x1 − x2 + 2x3 = 8.

Into (3): −4x1 − 2(4x1 − 10) + (x1 − 1) = −14 → −4x1 − 8x1 + 20 + x1 − 1 = −14 → (−11x1) + 19 = −14 → −11x1 = −33 → x1 = 3.

(2) 2x1 − x2 + 2x3 = 8
(4) x3 = x1 − 1
